AerodromeUtils and ConstProdUtils quote calculations against actual swap results ## Test Strategy For volatile pools (xy = k curve), we compare: 1. Pool's `getAmountOut()` - the on-chain reference implementation 2. Router's actual swap execution 3. Our local quote utilities (when applicable) The pool's `getAmountOut` is the ground truth for Aerodrome math. test_constProdUtils_saleQuote_parity_rev.notice: Test ConstProdUtils parity with reverse direction

test_volatileFee_denominator_is_10000().notice: Verify Aerodrome uses 10000 denominator (not 100000 like UniswapV2)

test_volatileFee_isApplied().notice: Validate fee is applied correctly by comparing with/without fee

test_volatileQuote_WETH_AERO_sellWETH().notice: Test volatile pool quote on WETH/AERO pair

test_volatileQuote_WETH_USDC_sellUSDC_sm.notice: Test volatile pool quote parity: sell USDC for WETH (reverse direction)

test_volatileQuote_WETH_USDC_sellWETH_me.notice: Test volatile pool quote with medium trade size
